name: Cherry or Blueberry Topped Ice Box Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Vanilla or Chocolate Instant Pudding/Pie Filling
1 3/4 cups Thawed non dairy whipped topping
2 cans (21 oz each) cherry or blueberry pie filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 13 x 9 inch pan with some of the graham crackers, breaking them if necessary.
2. Pour cold milk into a bowl.
3. Add pudding mix to the milk and beat with an electric mixer on low speed for 1 to 2 minutes until well blended.
4. Let the mixture stand for 5 minutes.
5. Blend in the non dairy whipped topping.
6. Spread half of the pudding mixture over the crackers.
7. Add another layer of crackers.
8. Top with the remaining pudding mixture and crackers.
9. Spread pie filling over the top.
10. Chill for about 3 hours.
